name: corvi-careers
description: Search jobs across remote and onsite postings with Corvi Careers.

interface.shortDescription: Search remote and onsite jobs with privacy-first tools.
interface.longDescription: Corvi Careers is an independent SF Bay Area project operated by sspworks LLC. Use it to search across 1M+ postings, refine queries with AI assistance, browse by category or location, and inspect job details through its MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Find software engineering jobs near San Francisco.
Search remote AI roles that match my background.
Summarize this job posting and key requirements.
